channel.title: AI Visual Synthesis
channel.description: Complete guide to AI image generation, prompt engineering, and visual synthesis. Updates on new prompts, techniques, and AI tools.

item.title: AI Visual Synthesis - Complete 2026 Guide
item.description: Master AI image generation in 2026. Complete interactive guide to Midjourney, DALL·E 3, Stable Diffusion, Flux.1 with 80+ prompt templates.

item.title: Prompt Templates Collection
item.description: Ready-to-use AI prompt templates for generating production-ready web applications. Developer prompts, design prompts, and custom prompt builder.

item.title: The Complete Framework
item.description: 8-Layer Prompt Architecture, Physics-First Parameters, Thinking Modes, Design Vocabulary, and Master Templates for AI image generation.
